# Function reference {.doc .doc-index}

## Executor

The engine behind `%%exercise`: run a cell body in a fresh, isolated
namespace and capture everything it produced.


| | |
| --- | --- |
| [run_exercise](run_exercise.qmd#script_widget.executor.run_exercise) | Run ``source`` in a fresh, isolated namespace and capture everything |
| [ExerciseResult](ExerciseResult.qmd#script_widget.executor.ExerciseResult) | The outcome of running one ``%%exercise`` cell. |

## Widget

The `anywidget`-based output widget and the `%%exercise` cell magic.


| | |
| --- | --- |
| [ExerciseOutputWidget](ExerciseOutputWidget.qmd#script_widget.widget.ExerciseOutputWidget) | Everything a ``%%exercise`` cell produced, rendered in a shaded box. |
| [register_exercise_magic](register_exercise_magic.qmd#script_widget.widget.register_exercise_magic) | Register the `%%exercise` cell magic. |
